content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 20, 2003

Susan Good, President
The Big Fresno Fair
1121 So. Chance Avenue
Fresno, CA 93702-3707

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-175

Dear Ms. Good:

This letter is in response to your request for advice on behalf of David Nalchajian regarding the revolving door provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 Pursuant to your August 12, 2003, correspondence, your request for advice is withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Counsel, Legal Division

NB:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\03-175

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
